subcodes.first_line: O Hasan! These are the days of the Most Great Test and the Supreme Trial. Hold fast unto the cord of divine favour and cling to the hem [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای حسن ایام ایام امتحان کبری است و افتتان عظمی بحبل عنایت متمسک شو و بذیل
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @knowledge; recognition of God
